hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(c|h)$'; then fmt=$(command -v clang-format 2>/dev/null || echo /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang-format); if [ -x "$fmt" ]; then "$fmt" -i "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE)|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|curl\s.*\|\s*sh|curl\s.*\|\s*bash|wget\s.*\|\s*sh|chmod\s+777|mkfs\.|dd\s+if=|:(){ :|:& };:)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: dangerous command pattern detected' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

if [ -f build/human_tests ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(c|h)$'; then echo 'C files changed — verifying build...' >&2; cmake --build build -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu 2>/dev/null || nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 4) 2>&1 | tail -5; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'BUILD FAILED — fix before completing' >&2; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0
